dependence.value: m&Detail;$000000, d&Detail;$000000, i&Detail;$000000, c&Detail;$000000, r&Tax;$000000, ctgt30

alias.value: master, detail, inquiry, general, tax, inputTax

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)

field.name: so_ct
field.resource: master, detail, inquiry, general, tax, inputTax

field.name: ngay_ct
field.resource: master, detail, inquiry, general, tax, inputTax

field.name: ma_kh
field.check: ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: loai_ct
field.check: loai_ct not in ('2', '3', '9')

field.name: tk
field.check: tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: tk_no
field.check: tk_no not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_kh_i
field.check: loai_ct = '3' and ma_kh_i not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)⩓loai_ct <> '3' and ma_kh_i <> ''

field.name: ma_thue
field.check: loai_ct = '2' and ma_thue <> ''⩓ma_thue = '' and ((tk_thue_no <> '') or (t_thue_nt <> 0) or (mau_bc <> '') or (ma_tc <> '') or (ma_mau_ct <> '') or (so_ct0 <> '') or (so_seri0 <> '') or (ngay_ct0 is not null) or (ma_kh_j <> '') or (ten_kh_j <> '') or (dia_chi_j <> '') or (ma_so_thue <> '') or (ten_vt <> '') or (ma_kh2 <> '') or (ghi_chu <> ''))⩓ma_thue <> '' and ma_thue not in (select ma_thue from dmthue)

field.name: tk_thue_no
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and tk_thue_no not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: mau_bc
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and mau_bc not in (select mau_bc from dmmaubc3)

field.name: ma_tc
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_tc not in (select ma_tc from v20dmtcthue)

field.name: so_ct0
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and so_ct0 = ''

field.name: ngay_ct0
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ngay_ct0 is null

field.name: ma_kh_j
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh_j <> '' and ma_kh_j not in (select ma_kh from dmkh where cc_yn = 1)

field.name: ten_kh_j
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ten_kh_j = ''

field.name: ma_kh2
field.check: ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh2 = '' and exists(select 1 from dmtk b where @@table.tk_thue_no = b.tk and b.tk_cn = 1)⩓ma_thue <> '' and ma_kh2 <> '' and ma_kh2 not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: so_lsx
field.check: so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: ma_hd
field.check: ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)

field.name: ma_phi
field.check: ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)

field.name: ma_ku
field.check: ma_ku not in (select ma_ku from dmku)

processing.text: &CheckVoucherRightBeforeProcess; declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @inputVATExists nvarchar(512), @inputVATDuplicate nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @tax varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @baseExchangeRate numeric(24, 12), @taxProperty varchar(3), @voucherTemplate varchar(32) declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundAmount int, @checkInputVAT bit, @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime select @d0 = getdate(), @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114), @status = left(replace(@status, '''', ''), 1) select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @tax = 'r&Tax;$', @voucherID = '&Code;' select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã tồn tại.' else '&s2; already exists.' end select @inputVATExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s3; đã được cập nhật trong phần thuế đầu vào.' else '&s4; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @inputVATDuplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s3; trùng nhau trong chi tiết thuế đầu vào.' else '&s4; already exists in Input VAT data.' end select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ws_id' select @taxProperty = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_tc_thue' select @voucherTemplate = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_mau_ct_dv' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien' select @baseExchangeRate = ty_gia from (select top 1 ty_gia from dmtgnt where ma_nt = @baseCurrency and ngay_ct <= getdate() order by ngay_ct desc) a if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_kthd_tdv' and val = '1') select @checkInputVAT = 1 else select @checkInputVAT = 0 select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_lsx' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)))) + rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) if @check$Unit <> '1' select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct else select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs --if @r is not null begin -- if @check$Unit <> '1' select replace(replace(replace(@duplicate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as --message from @@table where stt = @r -- else select replace(replace(replace(replace(@duplicate$Unit, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', rtrim(ma_dvcs)), '%s4', --@@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r -- return --end -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@max2 - len(ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)))) + ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)) select top 0 ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk into #unit from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #unit select ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk from @@table group by ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmdvcsks b, #unit c where a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and b.ma_dvcs = c.ma_dvcs and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmct2ks b where b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; -- Check code select @field = 'ma_dvcs', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)&Error; select @field = 'tk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_no', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_no not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh_i', @r = min(stt) from @@table where loai_ct='3' and ma_kh_i not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_kh_i', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh_i<>'' and ma_kh_i not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk <> '' and ma_nk not in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_hd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; select @field = 'ma_ku', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_ku <> '' and ma_ku not in (select ma_ku from dmku)&Error; update @@table set mau_bc = '3' where ma_thue <> '' and loai_ct <> '2' and mau_bc = '' update @@table set ma_tc = @taxProperty where ma_thue <> '' and loai_ct <> '2' and ma_tc = '' update @@table set ma_kh_j = ma_kh where ma_thue <> '' and loai_ct <> '2' and ma_kh_j = '' update @@table set tk_thue_no = case when a.tk_thue_no <> '' then a.tk_thue_no else b.tk_thue_no3 end from @@table a left join dmthue b on a.ma_thue = b.ma_thue where a.ma_thue <> '' and a.loai_ct <> '2' update @@table set ten_kh_j = case when a.ten_kh_j <> '' then a.ten_kh_j else b.ten_kh end, dia_chi_j = case when a.dia_chi_j <> '' then a.dia_chi_j else b.dia_chi end, ma_so_thue = case when a.ma_so_thue <> '' then a.ma_so_thue else rtrim(b.ma_so_thue) end from @@table a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh_j = b.ma_kh where a.ma_thue <> '' and a.loai_ct <> '2' -- Check Input VAT if @checkInputVAT = 1 begin select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a join @@table b on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue where a.ngay_ct <> b.ngay_ct or a.so_ct <> b.so_ct group by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATDuplicate, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join ctgt30 b with (index(c)) on a.so_ct0 = b.so_ct0 and a.so_seri0 = b.so_seri0 and a.ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct0 and a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@inputVATExists, '%s1', so_ct0), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end end -- Gather select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, cast(0 as int) as stt, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #id from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #id(stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, stt) select '', ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk order by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, tk select identity(int, 1, 1) as id, cast(stt as int) as stt, convert(varchar(8), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + ma_kh + tk as c, cast(0 as int) as ln into #ln from @@table order by ngay_ct, so_ct, stt declare @lineNumber int, @keyValue varchar(64), @sequence bit select @keyValue = null update #ln set @sequence = case when c = @keyValue then 1 else 0 end, @lineNumber = case when @sequence = 1 then @lineNumber + 1 else 1 end, ln = @lineNumber, @keyValue = c from #ln with (index(0)) create index i on #ln(stt) select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, line_nbr, ngay_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk_no, tien_nt, tien, thue_nt, thue, ma_kh_i, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi, ma_ku into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), @voucherID, i.ln, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.dien_giai_i, a.tk_no, a.tien_nt, round(a.tien_nt * @baseExchangeRate, @roundAmount), a.t_thue_nt, round(a.t_thue_nt * @baseExchangeRate, @roundAmount), a.ma_kh_i, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi, a.ma_ku from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.tk = b.tk left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, ma_nk, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, so_ct, ma_kh, ong_ba, dia_chi, dien_giai, loai_ct, tk, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_tt_nt, t_tt, t_thue_nt, t_thue into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, c.ma_dvcs, @voucherID, a.ma_nk, a.ngay_ct, a.ngay_ct, @baseCurrency, 1, a.so_ct, a.ma_kh, a.ong_ba, isnull(e.dia_chi, ''), a.dien_giai, a.loai_ct, a.tk, d.t_tien_nt, d.t_tien, d.t_tt_nt, d.t_tt, d.t_thue_nt, d.t_thue from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct and a.ma_kh = c.ma_kh and a.tk = c.tk join (select stt_rec, sum(tien_nt) as t_tien_nt, sum(tien) as t_tien, sum(tien_nt + thue_nt) as t_tt_nt, sum(tien + thue) as t_tt, sum(thue_nt) as t_thue_nt, sum(thue) as t_thue from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec left join dmkh e on a.ma_kh = e.ma_kh select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu into #r&Tax; from r&Tax;$000000 insert into #r&Tax; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, a.ma_dvcs, @voucherID, a.loai_ct, a.ngay_ct, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct0, a.so_ct0, a.so_seri0, a.ma_thue, isnull(d.thue_suat, 0), a.tien_nt, round(a.tien_nt * @baseExchangeRate, @roundAmount), a.t_thue_nt, round(a.t_thue_nt * @baseExchangeRate, @roundAmount), a.tk_thue_no, a.tk, a.mau_bc, a.ma_tc, a.ma_kh_j, a.ten_kh_j, a.dia_chi_j, a.ma_so_thue, a.ma_kh2, a.ten_vt, a.ghi_chu from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.tk = b.tk left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt where a.loai_ct <> '2' and a.ma_thue <> '' order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #i&Detail; from i&Detail;$000000 insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_kh) + '#20$' + rtrim(tk) + '#30$' + rtrim(@baseCurrency), '' from #m&Detail; select @q = dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Update$Inquiry('#i&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', 'd$', 'tk_no', '#10$', 'stt_rec', default, default, default, default, default) exec sp_executesql @q -- Insert declare @p varchar(32), @insertKey varchar(128), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32), @taxTable varchar(32), @fieldMaster varchar(8000), @fieldDetail varchar(8000), @fieldTax varchar(8000) select @fieldMaster ='stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, ma_nk, so_lo, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, so_ct, ma_kh, ong_ba, dia_chi, dien_giai, loai_ct, tk, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_tt_nt, t_tt, t_thue_nt, t_thue, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2 ' select @fieldDetail = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk_no, ' select @fieldDetail = @fieldDetail + 'tien_nt, tien, thue,' select @fieldDetail = @fieldDetail + ' ma_kh_i, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr,' select @fieldDetail = @fieldDetail + 'ma_hd, ma_ku, ma_phi, so_dh_i, ' select @fieldDetail = @fieldDetail + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select @fieldTax = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue,' select @fieldTax = @fieldTax + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, ma_nt, ty_gia, status' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0'), @insertKey = 'month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @taxTable = @tax + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p -- m56 select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + '(' + @fieldMaster + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_ct, ma_nk, '''', ngay_lct, ngay_ct, ma_nt, ty_gia, so_ct, ma_kh, ong_ba, dia_chi, dien_giai, loai_ct, tk, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_tt_nt, t_tt, t_thue_nt, t_thue ' select @q = @q + ',getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) select @q = @q + ' from #m&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- d56 select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @fieldDetail + ')' select @q = @q + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk_no, ' select @q = @q + 'tien_nt, tien, thue, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_kh_i, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_hd, ma_ku, ma_phi, '''', ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- i56 select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- c56 select @q = 'insert into ' + @general + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0' select @q = @q + ' from #i&Detail; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q --r30 select @q = 'insert into ' + @taxTable + '(' + @fieldTax + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct,' select @q = @q + 'line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue,' select @q = @q + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, '''', 1, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #r&Tax; where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end if exists(select 1 from #r&Tax;) begin select @q = 'insert into ctgt30 ' + '(' + @fieldTax + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct,' select @q = @q + 'line_nbr, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ngay_lct, ngay_ct, so_ct, ngay_ct0, so_ct0, so_seri0, ma_thue, thue_suat, t_tien_nt, t_tien, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ' select @q = @q + 'tk_thue_no, tk_du, mau_bc, ma_tc, ma_kh, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, ma_kh2, ten_vt, ghi_chu, '''', 1, ''' + @status + '''' select @q = @q + ' from #r&Tax; ' exec sp_executesql @q end if @status = '2' begin declare @glGroup varchar(128), @glAcctField varchar(128), @glAcctFieldRef varchar(128), @glAmountField varchar(128), @glFCAmountField varchar(128), @glKey varchar(512), @glNoAccList varchar(128), @glNoAccListRef varchar(128), @glGroups varchar(128) declare @External nvarchar(4000), @Statement nvarchar(4000), @Numeric varchar(4000), @String varchar(4000) select @glAcctField = 'tk_no', @glAcctFieldRef = 'tk', @glAmountField = 'tien', @glFCAmountField = 'tien_nt', @glKey = '1=1', @glNoAccList = '0', @glNoAccListRef = '0', @glGroups = '1' select @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'so_lo, ong_ba, ma_gd, so_dh, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3', @External = 'dien_giai_h = b.dien_giai, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user), @Statement = '' select @glGroup = rtrim(groupby) from @@sysDatabaseName..voucherinfo where ma_ct = @voucherID select a.*, b.loai_ct, b.ma_kh, b.ma_kh as ma_kh_ref into #dGL0 from #d&Detail; a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #dGL0 set ma_kh = ma_kh_i, ma_kh_ref = ma_kh_i where loai_ct = '3' select *, ma_kh as ma_kh_ref, cast('' as nvarchar(512)) as dien_giai into #glVAT from #r&Tax; where t_thue_nt + t_thue <> 0 update #glVAT set ma_kh2 = '' where tk_thue_no in (select tk from dmtk where tk_cn = 0) update #glVAT set loai_ct = b.loai_ct, ma_kh = case when a.ma_kh2 <> '' then a.ma_kh2 else b.ma_kh end, ma_kh_ref = b.ma_kh, dien_giai = b.dien_giai from #glVAT a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec insert into #dGL0 (stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, loai_ct, so_ct, dien_giai, tk_no, tien_nt, tien, ma_kh, ma_kh_ref, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi, ma_ku) select stt_rec, max(stt_rec0), max(line_nbr), max(ngay_ct), max(loai_ct), max(so_ct), max(dien_giai), tk_thue_no, sum(t_thue_nt), sum(t_thue), ma_kh, ma_kh_ref, '', '', '', '', '', '', '' from #glVAT group by stt_rec, ma_kh, ma_kh_ref, tk_thue_no select a.*, b.tk, b.ma_dvcs, b.ngay_ct as ngay_lct, rtrim(@baseCurrency) as ma_nt, cast(1 as numeric(24, 12)) as ty_gia, a.dien_giai as dien_giai_h, b.ma_nk into #dGL from #dGL0 a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec Update #dGL set ma_ct='BN1' exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostGL2 '#m&Detail;', '#dGL', @voucherID, @glAcctField, @glAcctFieldRef, @glAmountField, @glFCAmountField, @glKey, @glNoAccList, @glNoAccListRef, @glGroup, @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '#k', @glGroups end
